title: S3032 220V 50Hz DC31-00181E Drain Pump Motor，Compatible For Samsung，Washing Machine Washer Drainage Parts
features: Drainage is fast and efficient: It can achieve a lift of 1.2 - 1.8 meters and a flow rate of 10 - 20 L/min. It can empty 120L of wastewater in just 10 - 15 seconds, significantly reducing the waiting time for laundry and enabling efficient continuous washing as well.

Quiet and low-noise operation: Through direct current variable frequency, balanced impeller design and shock absorption technology, the operating noise is below 50 dB. Nighttime laundry will not disturb family rest.

Compact and space-saving: The modular thin design reduces the volume by 10% compared to traditional models. The thickness is less than 30mm, making it easy to install for various washing machine models.

Flexible and convenient drainage: It supports both top drainage and bottom drainage. The top drainage lift can reach 2 meters. Whether the washing machine is placed at a high position or in a special type of house, it can drain flexibly.

Early fault warning: Some high-end motors have built-in sensors that can monitor parameters such as speed and temperature. The abnormal recognition rate is 98%, allowing problems to be identified in advance and preventing major failures.
